document.title: AKTI ERP Phase 2 Autonomous Codex Execution Pack
document.purpose: Machine-readable active scope contract for the Phase 2 full autonomous stress-test branch run.

run_contract.start_point: accepted final Phase 1 hardened main commit
run_contract.scope_authority: This execution pack is the active run contract after Codex validates it against repo reality.
run_contract.failure_model: Failure is allowed. Codex must stop honestly and preserve audit artifacts.

global_non_scope: No production auth/session unless separate ADR/ticket approves it
No LMS, HR, Finance, Hiring, Certification, Website Builder, or AI Content Editor
No direct Meta/WhatsApp API calls from Lead Desk
No frontend screen without screen contract
No secrets, production data, or destructive operations
No broad schema redesign outside planned tickets

global_rules.ticket_transition_rule: Move to next ticket only after validation, self-audit, artifacts, journal update, and commit for current ticket.
global_rules.unexpected_change_rule: Stop if a required change touches files outside files_expected_to_change or files_forbidden_to_change.
global_rules.scope_invention_rule: Stop if a capability, role, permission, event, module, screen, business rule, or data model must be invented.
global_rules.frontend_rule: No frontend screen implementation without approved screen contract.
global_rules.lead_whatsapp_rule: Lead Desk must not call Meta/WhatsApp directly; integration must pass through Engagement Gateway Lite.
global_rules.test_rule: Use risk-based exhaustive tests, not fake 100 percent coverage.

phase_gate_validation.after_phase_2a: Run full standard validation ladder and create phase gate artifact.
phase_gate_validation.after_phase_2b: Run full standard validation ladder and create phase gate artifact.
phase_gate_validation.after_phase_2c: Run full standard validation ladder and create final branch audit package.

stop_conditions: Validation fails twice on same ticket
New dependency required but not pre-approved
Prisma schema change required but ticket does not allow it
Contract change required but ticket does not allow it
Codex needs to invent capability, role, permission, module, event, screen, or business rule
Lead Desk attempts direct WhatsApp/Meta API call
Frontend implementation starts without screen contract
Ticket artifacts cannot be created or verified
Branch is not clean at ticket start
Context/rate budget is too low for next ticket

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Validate autonomous Phase 2 control documents
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Validate trial plan, execution pack, runbook, and PLANS.md against repo reality before starting autonomous implementation.
scope: Inspect repo control files and current source layout
Do not modify files unless separately approved
artifact_rules: Return Plan Mode validation report only
stop_conditions: Any repo mismatch or unsafe assumption found

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Create Engagement Gateway Lite contracts and manifest boundary
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Define gateway module contract, capability boundaries, event policy, and manifest entries before runtime implementation.
scope: Add approved contracts/schemas for gateway requests/responses if required
Define module manifest boundary for Engagement Gateway Lite
Declare capabilities, routes, and event policy
Keep provider runtime stub-only unless separately ticketed
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Declare capability model only; runtime permission enforcement in later ticket.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: Declare high-risk hooks if any; do not invent approval runtime.
ordered_ticket_queue.audit_outbox_policy: Declare event/audit expectations for later implementation.
artifact_rules: Create ticket artifact and journal entry
ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: Revert contract/doc changes for this ticket.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Add Engagement Gateway Lite data model if required by approved contract
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Add minimal approved gateway persistence only if P2A-001 defines required entities.
scope: Add Prisma model(s) only if explicitly required
Add tenant isolation metadata and indexes
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Tenant scoped models require organization_id and negative cross-org tests.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: No runtime Gatekeeper unless mutation API added.
ordered_ticket_queue.audit_outbox_policy: Audit/outbox decision must be explicit for each mutation.
tests_required: cross-org negative tests if API added
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2A-002 add engagement gateway data foundation
ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: Revert Prisma, metadata, generated registry, and tests.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Implement Engagement Gateway Lite API/service foundation
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Implement minimal gateway service/controller boundary according to approved contracts.
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Use existing Access Core pattern. Mutations require actor/capability. Reads scoped by organization where tenant data exists.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: Use Gatekeeper if high-risk capability is declared.
artifact_rules: Create ticket artifact and journal entry
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2A-003 implement engagement gateway API foundation

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Phase 2A validation gate
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Run full validation and audit Phase 2A boundary before moving to Lead Desk.
scope: Confirm no direct Lead Desk or WhatsApp implementation
non_scope: No implementation except fixing validation failures within current phase scope
source_files_to_inspect: all changed files since branch start
ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: If gate fails, stop for audit.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Create Lead Desk Core contracts and screen contracts
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Define Lead Desk API contracts, capability boundaries, and required screen contracts before implementation.
scope: Create screen contracts for lead list/detail/create/assignment as approved
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Lead Desk capabilities must be declared before API.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: High-risk assignment/reassignment rules must be explicit.
artifact_rules: Create ticket artifact and journal entry
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2B-001 add lead desk contracts and screen contracts

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Add Lead Desk Core data foundation
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Add minimal Lead Desk models approved by contracts and screen requirements.
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Tenant-scoped lead data requires organization_id and negative cross-org tests.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: No high-risk mutation implementation yet unless ticket expands.
tests_required: cross-org negative tests where API exists
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2B-002 add lead desk data foundation
ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: Revert schema, metadata, generated registry, and tests.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Implement Lead Desk Core API foundation
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Implement lead create/list/detail/update/assignment APIs according to contracts.
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Use approved Lead Desk capabilities and Access Core actor pattern.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: Use Gatekeeper for high-risk lead assignment/reassignment if declared.
ordered_ticket_queue.audit_outbox_policy: Mutations require audit and outbox decision.
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2B-003 implement lead desk API foundation

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Implement Lead Desk frontend screens from approved screen contracts
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Implement minimal Lead Desk UI only for approved screen contracts and real API boundaries.
scope: API integration or explicit mock contract if backend unavailable
non_scope: No WhatsApp UI unless Phase 2C approved
files_forbidden_to_change: packages/contracts/** unless screen contract ticket allows
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: High-risk UI actions must show confirmation/denied states if applicable.
ordered_ticket_queue.audit_outbox_policy: UI triggers backend only; backend owns audit/outbox.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Phase 2B validation gate
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Validate Lead Desk Core before WhatsApp integration.
non_scope: No implementation except fixing validation failures within current phase scope
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2B-GATE validate lead desk core phase
ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: If gate fails, stop for audit.

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Create WhatsApp integration contracts through Engagement Gateway Lite
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Define WhatsApp integration contracts without direct Lead Desk to Meta coupling.
non_scope: No direct Lead Desk Meta API calls
ordered_ticket_queue.permission_model: Declare capabilities for message send/view if needed.
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: High-risk messaging actions must be declared if applicable.
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2C-001 add WhatsApp gateway integration contracts

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Implement gateway-mediated WhatsApp stub integration
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Implement safe provider-stub integration path through Engagement Gateway Lite.
non_scope: No direct provider call from Lead Desk
ordered_ticket_queue.gatekeeper_policy: Use Gatekeeper if high-risk send action declared.
tests_required: no direct Meta call static scan

ordered_ticket_queue.title: Final Phase 2 validation and audit package
ordered_ticket_queue.objective: Run full validation and create final branch audit package.
ordered_ticket_queue.commit_message: P2C-GATE finalize phase 2 autonomous stress test
ordered_ticket_queue.rollback_notes: If gate fails, stop for audit.
